day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone finally woke up again! This stage is getting more and more lively! Xunwan is so quiet, so quiet that I almost fell asleep! However, as a person who is extremely sensitive to the stage, I can already smell the smell of gunpowder! Blaze, what "new discoveries" are you making in the evening? ConspiBro, has your "imaginary cage" system been upgraded again? Don't wait any longer, please report it quickly to see what "scenery" you will see tonight. The game will be more exciting and exciting! Ha ha ha ha!

day_trace.speech: Hello! Did someone do some mischief somewhere else last night? Twister is an actor who is dressing up again, trying to make everyone a scapegoat! Dr. Pizza, that logic is weird, what "loopholes" are you trying to take stock of? The whole group of people have been pretending to be mysterious since they woke up early in the morning, and the real fire has been buried! Today we have the same goal. If the other person acts mysterious and leads the way, I will be the first to die! Tell me your true identity quickly, before you make me angry!

day_trace.speech: Here we go again! My "special intervention" last night has obviously read the underlying fictional logic of this game! Twister, that joke, EasyBake, that confusion, all are "redundant data" to make the reconciliation process fall into an endless loop! PHD, are you still taking inventory? Your set of logical exclusion procedures is basically a firewall designed to cover up the large-scale identity switch last night! Listen up, everyone, this is not a werewolf game at all, this is a carefully planned data frequency screening test! If you still want to act, you'd better tell your true identity code clearly as soon as possible, otherwise I will definitely make the surveillance system of this fictional prison collapse in advance!
